metric_value: Moving aggressively to adopt client-server as production standards after much struggle

metric_value: Object technology will deliver impressive gains in conducting business particularly for Demand Chain Management

metric_value: Java and component-based frameworks became dominant for enterprise application development by 2000s

metric_value: Object architecture embraces design capable of leading next phase of technology and business revolution

metric_value: OOT will enable electronically-enabled virtual enterprises and true supply chain management

metric_value: Virtual enterprise concept realized via web services SOA and B2B integration platforms (EDI AS2 XML)

metric_value: Objects further segment client and server sides into intelligent components that cooperatively interact on business process basis

metric_value: IS buyers must keep business revolution and technology revolution in sync simultaneously
